meta.title: Altitude Music — Recording Studio & Label | Louvain-la-Neuve
meta.description: Recording studio and label dedicated to emerging artists in Louvain-la-Neuve. Recording, mix, mastering, custom production, cover art. Since 2018.

hero.title: Sound that sounds like you.
hero.sub: Recording studio and label dedicated to emerging artists. Tailored sessions, polished production, custom cover art — we walk your project from first sound to release.

sections.servicesSub: Clear packages, custom quotes for ambitious projects.
sections.portfolioSub: A scene in motion — talent we walk from first sound to release, with a strong vision and identity.
sections.aboutSub: A collective, a studio, a mission.
sections.testimonialsSub: What the artists we work with have to say.
sections.bookingSub: Pick your time. Synced with the studio calendar.
sections.contactSub: We reply fast — Instagram for the quickest answer.

serviceDetail.noReviews: No reviews yet for this service.

about.storyText: Altitude Music was founded in 2023 as a non-profit, but the collective has been around since 2018. Since then, we've been a key player in the Louvain-la-Neuve music scene. Our mission is to support and develop the artistic potential of young creators, putting hip-hop music forward as a means of artistic expression.
about.teamText: Production, mix, master, cover art, music videos… Our team brings everything together to move your project forward, from sound to image.
